# Worked example Flows

These are **complete, deep Flows** — read them end-to-end to see the shape the
blueprint skeleton (`../FLOW.md`) asks you to fill in.

- `wedding-photography-delivery/` — a full non-coding Flow (BRIEF → SHOOT-PLAN →
  CAPTURE → CULL/EDIT → DELIVER) with nested ECA leaves and hard gates.

**Do not edit these in place, and do not submit them as your Flow.** Copy the
skeleton at `../FLOW.md`, read an example here for the shape, then build your own.
